title: Senior Data Engineer
degreeRequirement: Bachelor's degree in Math, Statistics, CS, or equivalent experience
hiringReason: Re-architecting the central data warehouse pipelines for real-time analytics.
businessProblem: Batch processing lag causes reports to be delayed by up to 24 hours.
outcomes: Reduce ingestion lag from 24 hours to under 5 minutes for streaming data analytics.
Optimize storage costs on Snowflake by 20% through custom schema partition rules.

responsibilities.text: Design, build, and maintain streaming and batch ETL pipelines using Apache Spark.
Manage and partition data warehouse clusters on Snowflake or BigQuery.
